locationSettings.description: Configure your location to receive seasonal produce recommendations and recipes

userLocation.instructions: Update 'region' below with your location. Examples: US - Northeast, US - Southeast, US - Midwest, US - Southwest, US - Pacific, Canada - Ontario, Europe - UK, etc.

us_northeast.notes: Short growing season, focus on storage crops and seasonal succession

us_southeast.notes: Longer growing season, two planting cycles possible

us_midwest.notes: Moderate growing season, excellent for corn, beans, squash

us_southwest.notes: Two growing seasons possible, very hot summers

us_pacific.notes: Long growing season, year-round possibilities in parts of California

canada_ontario.notes: Shorter season, excellent farmers markets in summer

europe_uk.notes: Moderate growing season, excellent for brassicas and root vegetables

australia.notes: Opposite seasons - Spring Sept-Nov, Summer Dec-Feb, Fall Mar-May, Winter Jun-Aug

userPreferences.description: Which season do you prefer to focus on? (spring, summer, fall, winter, or year-round)

mealPlanPreferences.description: When true, meal plans will prioritize in-season produce from your region
mealPlanPreferences.description2: When true, exclude out-of-season produce entirely (more strict)

locationSettings.notes: Update these settings to customize your seasonal meal planning experience
